title: ConvertKit vs Mailgun (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: ConvertKit vs Mailgun: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between ConvertKit and Mailgun comes down to your specific use case. ConvertKit is built for creators, bloggers, and course sellers, while Mailgun targets developers sending transactional and bulk email via API.

comparison_table.tool_b: Developers Sending Transactional And Bulk Email Via Api

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on creators, bloggers, and course sellers
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on developers sending transactional and bulk email via API

faq.a: It depends on your use case. ConvertKit wins for creators, bloggers, and course sellers, while Mailgun is stronger for developers sending transactional and bulk email via API.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, ConvertKit or Mailgun?
faq.a: Mailgun starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Mailgun to ConvertKit?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
